title: Impl: Claude batch file submission and result retrieval
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/121

Wire Claude batch API: JSONL upload, batch creation, polling, result download. Handle Claude-specific limits (100K requests, 256MB, 24h window). Prompt caching support.

**Depends on:** Status mapping task.
**Deliverable:** Working Claude batch integration end-to-end.
